calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-268 dACC conflict-saturation LIVE-LOOP falsifier (ecological analogue of 463b)
items.note: Ecological (live-loop) analogue of V3-EXQ-463b. 463b validated MECH-268 f_sat ONLY via manual per-step record_outcome injection (synthetic). This run makes NO manual record_outcome call and proves the DACC _outcome_history FIFO is filled by the LIVE agent.py select_action tail (F-C3 wiring, ree-v3 main c7fc045, 2026-07-09) via a counting spy; chronic-harm env (num_hazards=6) keeps z_harm_a supra-threshold so the recurring harm class saturates. ARM_ON final-third sat_factor<0.95 vs ARM_OFF ~1.0 (OFF also has zero live record calls -- gating check). CLEARS a re-derive brake: MECH-268 had 5 substrate_ceiling autopsies (SD-034-closure-cluster 2026-06-12, SD-034-closure-control-plane-d 2026-06-13, V3-EXQ-460b-461b-464b-466b 2026-06-04, V3-EXQ-468e 2026-06-18, V3-EXQ-468f 2026-06-20) all PREDATING the c7fc045 live-path wiring this experiment is the first to exercise ecologically -- brake RELEASED per queue-experiment Step 2.5b (upstream substrate now BUILT). ARM_OFF is minted reuse-eligible (arm_cell, include_driver_script_in_hash=False; reuse assumes a cloud linux-x86_64-py3.10 claim). PROMOTES NOTHING -- closes the 'validated only via synthetic injection' gap (design_implementation_audit_2026-07-09.md sec 6, MECH-268 gov follow-up #2).

items.title: SD-049 Phase 2 reef behavioural validation, sleep-on ablation (rerun, supersedes 538; paired to 514f)
items.note: Successor to V3-EXQ-538 which SIGTERMed on ree-cloud-1 (2026-05-08 silent-fail cluster with 433f/537; no manifest). No design change vs 538 (experiment_type bump + supersedes manifest field only). Script tags 5 claims, SD-049 primary. machine_affinity any per prefer-cloud + Phase-3 SIGTERM protection. Smoke: 27min of live torch training against current substrate, zero errors (imports/attrs/shapes clean); dry-run steps unreduced so full completion is slow. Diagnosed via /diagnose-errors 2026-07-09.

items.title: MECH-163 V3 full-completion gate -- VTA/hippocampally-planned arm (rerun, supersedes 495)
items.note: Successor to V3-EXQ-495 which SIGTERMed on ree-cloud-1 after ~4h (undersized CX22 platform restart -- not a code path; no manifest). No design change vs 495 (experiment_type bump + supersedes manifest field only). machine_affinity any: cloud-1 is now the excluded hub and surviving workers carry Phase-3 SIGTERM protection (transient exit codes + HELD_BY_SELF). Smoke-passed against current substrate 2026-07-09 (base full dry-run 137s + letter past-init). Diagnosed via /diagnose-errors.
